Name: M 51 - Wayne G. Hawley, Conflicts of Interest Board
Title: RESOLUTION APPROVING THE APPOINTMENT BY THE COMPTROLLER OF WAYNE G. HAWLEY AS A MEMBER OF THE NEW YORK CITY CONFLICTS OF INTEREST BOARD.
BodyName: Committee on Rules, Privileges, Elections, Standards and Ethics

History.Description: This Resolution was Approved by Committee
History.BodyName: Committee on Rules, Privileges, Elections, Standards and Ethics

Text:
RESOLVED, Pursuant to Section 2602 of the New York City Charter, the Council hereby approves the appointment by the Comptroller of Wayne G. Hawley as a member of the New York City Conflicts of Interest Board to serve the remainder of a six-year term that will expire on March 31, 2028.

COUPLED ON GO
